title: Ultra-thin Section Staining
author: Debora Ferreira Barreto-Vieira
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.jqwcmxe

steps.instruction: Place the grid on drops of uranyl acetate and incubate for 15 minutes.
Rinse the grind in water several times.

Place the grid on drops of lead citrate and incubate for 4 minutes. In order to avoid precipitation of lead citrate by exposure to carbon dioxide, add pellets of sodium hydroxide in the dish where incubation takes place.
Rinse the grind in water several times.
